case_title: FRANK WONG ET AL VS. JESUS A. LEIVA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED FEB-08-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEIVA, JESUS A.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2016 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, FRANK WONG, ANNA AS TO DEFENDANT LEIVA, JESUS A.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WONG, FRANK WONG, ANNA AS TO DEFENDANT LEIVA, JESUS A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF CORRECTION OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, FRANK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-23-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-23-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER WENDY MAESTRACCI. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, FRANK WONG, ANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEIVA, JESUS A. $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LEIVA, JESUS A.
